name: NoX Sync

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## First official release of [NoX Sync](https://github.com/mapherez/nox-sync) plugin for [Obsidian](https://obsidian.md/)

If installing manually:
 - open your vault's folder
 - navigate to .obsidian/plugins
 - create a **nox-sync** folder
 - download and move the 3 files (main.js, manifest.json, styles.css) from this release into the created folder

It should look like this:
```text
<your-vault>/
  .obsidian/
    plugins/
      nox-sync/
        main.js
        manifest.json
        styles.css
```

Please remember to check the [README](https://github.com/mapherez/nox-sync/blob/master/README.md) and the other docs, in case you have any questions.

Enjoy! 🫰
